text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower suffers an injury during training, so
I bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm all patched up, let's get back to
training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I think I... No! I am! Really!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it wouldn't feel right to take a break
over an injury this minor... So, please!
choice_data_list:
Pushing yourself so hard doesn't make you
grown-up.
Let's figure out what you can handle.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: It's best to err on the side of caution.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. It would be bad if I made my injury
worse.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay, then. I'll just rest up for today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower sounds rather disappointed as she
returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you, Trainer! Okay, then! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I should be okay at this speed...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I felt a jolt in my leg...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I said I was fine, but I don't think I can push
on today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide that trying to do any more would
prove fruitless, and Nishino Flower goes back to
her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This is great! Trainer, light jogging doesn't hurt at
all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I can do much more than this for a
while, but I hope you won't mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A joyful Nishino Flower successfully completes
her training session while taking care not to
aggravate her injury.
